scripts.build: tsc && npm run build -w @mio/emotion && npm run build -w @mio/idrag
scripts.test: npm run build && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-emotion.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/golden-turn.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/smoke.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-http.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-openai-compat.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/openai-http-compat.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-onebot.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-context-engine.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-vector-incremental.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-semantic-memory.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-sqlite-vector.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-memory-review.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-proactive-quality.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-smart-proactive.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-weclaw-notify-isolation.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-im-session-isolation.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-structured-extract.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-rerank.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-entity-graph-temporal.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-progression-wiring.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-layered-persona.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-rrf-fusion.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-knowledge-base.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-compression.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-memory-recall-scope.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-wiring.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-modality.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-inference-guardrails.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-reply-necessity.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-directive-isolation.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-persona-tool-allowlist.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-begin-dialogs.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-im-pacing.ts && MIO_PROVIDER=mock node --experimental-strip-types tests/unit-circadian.ts && npm run test:web
scripts.test:web: node tests/web/liveness.test.mjs && node tests/web/mascot.test.mjs && node tests/web/memories.test.mjs
scripts.eval:paper: npm run build && MIO_PROVIDER=mock MINIMAX_DISABLE=true node --experimental-strip-types eval/run.ts
scripts.eval:quality: npm run build && MIO_PROVIDER=mock MINIMAX_DISABLE=true node --experimental-strip-types eval/quality-gate.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && npm run typecheck -w @mio/emotion && npm run build -w @mio/emotion && npm run typecheck -w @mio/idrag
